content.full_text:
May 21, 2003

Linda Trask-Lee  
Post Office Box 2106  
Santa Maria, CA 93457-2106

Re: Your Request for Advice  
Our File No. W-03-088

Dear Ms. Trask-Lee:

This letter is to inform you that we have withdrawn your request for advice concerning provisions of the Political Reform Act because, as we discussed over the telephone, your questions could be more fully and appropriately resolved through conversations with our Technical Assistance Division. (Regulation 18329(b)(8).)

If any questions remain unanswered after your contact with our Political Reform Consultants, we will be happy to provide you with any necessary written advice.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca  
General Counsel

By: Lawrence T. Woodlock  
Senior Counsel, Legal Division
